_comment: SL Monitor Configuration - Customize these settings for your trading style
_default_sl_pct_help: Default SL percentage for stocks/indices (5% = risking 5% per trade)
_commodity_sl_pct_help: SL percentage for commodities (4% avoids circuit limit issues)
_atr_multiplier_help: ATR multiplier for volatility-based SL (1.5 = 1.5x ATR). Higher = more room, Lower = tighter stops. Try 1.0-2.5
_atr_period_help: Number of periods for ATR calculation (14 is standard)
_atr_candle_interval_help: Candle size for ATR: 'minute', '5minute', '15minute'. Smaller = more sensitive, Larger = smoother
_atr_lookback_hours_help: Hours of historical data to fetch for ATR (2 hours = ~24 5-min candles)
_atr_cache_minutes_help: Cache ATR value for N minutes (reduces API calls)
_commodities_help: Keywords to identify commodities. Any symbol containing these gets commodity_sl_pct instead of default_sl_pct
_daily_loss_limit_help: Circuit breaker: if realized PnL falls below this (negative INR), block all new algo entries for the day. Reads daily_pnl_state.json maintained by SL monitor.
_reentry_cooldown_minutes_help: Minutes to block re-entry after an SL hit. 0 = block all day (old behaviour). 30 = allow re-entry 30 min after SL hit. Applies per exact strike/symbol.
_min_hold_candles_help: Minutes after entry during which SL checks are suppressed. Protects against opening IV crush and price discovery noise. Was 3; raised to 10 based on 2026-05-15 analysis.
_atr_trail_mult_help: Trail SL distance = 1-min ATR × this multiplier, anchored to PEAK (not LTP). 2.0 = 2× ATR from peak.
_atr_beven_mult_help: Move SL to breakeven when gain ≥ atr_beven_mult × ATR. 0.5 = breakeven after half-ATR gain.
_breakeven_trigger_pct_help: Pct-fallback breakeven (when no ATR data yet). Was 3%; now 1% to match ATR mode behaviour.
_trail_trigger_pct_help: Pct-fallback trail trigger. Was 5%; now 2% to engage trail sooner after breakeven.
_trail_pct_am_help: Trail % from PEAK before 13:00 IST. Was 5% from LTP; now 3% from PEAK.
_atr_max_pct_options_help: Maximum initial SL width for options (cap ATR-based SL at 8%).
_max_entries_per_strategy_per_day_help: Max orders per strategy per day. Prevents over-trading a single strategy on choppy days. Raise to 3-4 on strong trending days if needed.
_max_algo_per_symbol_help: Max concurrent algo positions open per underlying symbol (across all strategies). Live=1 for capital protection. Paper mode overrides to 100 regardless of this value.
_max_orders_per_5min_help: Burst rate limiter: max algo orders placed across ALL strategies in any 5-minute window.
_otm_filter_pct_help: Skip if strike is more than this % OTM from spot (near-expiry index options only).
_late_entry_time_help: No new entries at or after this time (HH:MM IST) for near-expiry options.
_near_expiry_days_help: Days-to-expiry threshold below which tighter OTM and late-entry filters apply.
_vwap_max_above_pct_help: Skip if option entry price is more than this % above its VWAP (all options).
_chase_idx_max_pct_help: Index options: skip if entry price is more than this % above the day's open price.
_chase_stk_max_pct_help: Stock options: skip if entry price is more than this % above the day's open price.
_min_vwap_candles_help: Minimum 1-min candles needed to compute a reliable VWAP.
_lot_size_max_help: Skip if the resolved lot size exceeds this.
_momentum_candles_help: Number of 1-min bars to look back for index momentum direction filter.
_momentum_min_pct_help: Block CE if index fell more than this % over momentum_candles bars; block PE if index rose more.
_orb_end_time_help: No ORB_VWAP entries after this time (HH:MM IST).
_orb_min_clearance_pct_help: Price must clear the ORB level by at least this % to avoid micro-breakout entries.
_orb_adx_min_help: Minimum ADX required for an ORB breakout signal.
_orb_range_min_pct_help: ORB range must be at least this % of spot.
_orb_range_max_pct_help: ORB range must be at most this % of spot.
_orb_body_ratio_help: Breakout candle body fraction (0.0–1.0) of total candle range. Rejects doji breakouts.
